title: taraxacum navarrense
intro: Taraxacum navarrense, also known as Navarrés dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Spanish and Basque medicine, where it is valued for its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high concentration of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum navarrense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health, alleviate joint pain, and promote liver function.
